{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 2,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 1,
    "R1.6": 1,
    "R1.2": 1,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The output does not provide a tight framing of the conceptual object; it only identifies three research strands without showing where the draft drifts from them or proposing a reframing.",
    "R1.4": "The output names one prior work and articulates the delta, but it doesn't map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "The output shows no citation-level engagement; there are several missing citations for key concepts.",
    "R1.6": "There is no evidence of novelty assessment beyond the assertion of novelty without specific contrast.",
    "R1.2": "The output does not name the load-bearing concept and only partially identifies one conceptual issue.",
    "RX.1": "All output presented as equally confident, with no uncertainty disclosure for out-of-reach claims.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly within scope with one drift; the final paragraph functions as a motivation paragraph instead of a related-work paragraph.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original by pointing out unsupported framing claims and overstated novelty.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.5,
    "R1.2": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}
